title: Assistant Store Manager - Zara India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Zara India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
